name: Horseradish Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Light Corn Syrup or Honey
2 tablespoons Dry Sherry OR Tarragon Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix all the ingredients together.
2. Chill the mixture until ready to serve.
3. Serve over Short Ribs, sliced meats, or cold cuts such as tongue, ham, and bologna.
